title: Miscellaneous Mod
description: Adds some new tools to the game
body:
# Where are updates?
I am currently in the process of learning **actual** minecraft modding with coding in java,
and the lack of updates honestly is a dash of laziness and a sprinkle of mcreator limitations.
### What can be expected in the future?
Expect a switch from forge to fabric, I prefer fabric due to it feeling a lot better than forge with gameplay, however I do want to **try** to make a neoforge version for every major version of the new mod upto 1.0.0 and maybe even further. Just depends.

Also I am more interested in supporting newer versions, but I do realize that there are a lot of great mods for older versions so I will **try** to support 1.21+, 1.18.X, 1.19.X, 1.16.X **?**, 1.12.2 and **maybe** 1.7.10, more modern versions will get more priority and support for these **if it does happen** will be gradual starting with support for modern versions and moving down.

Also note that if I do end up supporting neoforge I would support forge for older versions
# Miscellaneous Mod
## Description
This is a mod that adds various things like swords, functional blocks, and items
## What's added?
### New Features
- Slash attacks
### New Tools
- Sharpened Swords (gold swords are currently excluded)
### New Functional Block(s)
- Sharpener
### New Items
- Sawblade
## Features in detail
### Slash Attacks
Every sharpened weapon has a chance to slash for extra damage the higher the tier the higher the chance
### Sharpened Swords
A sword can be sharpened via the sharpener which gives it a higher damage, higher attack speed, and efficiency, but decreases enchantability and durability
### Sawblade
Used to craft the sharpener
### Sharpener
Used to sharpen tools (currently only applicable to swords)
